applied.note: addVideoWatchXP: XP yozish endi atomik — UserStats.findOneAndUpdate($inc:{xp:50,weeklyXp:50,videosWatched:1}, upsert+setDefaultsOnInsert) read-modify-write o'rniga. User.xp mirror ham atomik User.findByIdAndUpdate($inc:{xp:50}, $set:{streak,rankTitle}). Streak/level/lastActivity logikasi va awardBadges saqlangan; level yangilangan xp'dan calculateLevel() bilan hisoblanadi. IDEMPOTENTLIK SKIPPED: UserStats'da watchedVideos/seen sxemasi yo'q va funksiya videoId'ni saqlamaydi — ishonchli 'ko'rilgan video' manbasi bo'lmagani uchun double-award guard qo'shilmadi (sxemani buzmaslik uchun). Faqat race fix qo'llandi.

likePrompt: atomik toggle — Prompt.exists() bilan holatni aniqlab, $pull+$inc:-1 yoki $addToSet+$inc:+1 (findByIdAndUpdate new:true). Lost-update race bartaraf etildi. Javob shakli saqlangan: {success, liked, likesCount}. 404 guard updated==null holati uchun qo'shildi.

getPrompt (GET /:id) endi read-only: Prompt.findById(...).populate(...).lean() — viewsCount $inc OLIB TASHLANDI. View inkrement faqat POST /:id/view (viewPrompt) da qoladi. Double view-count bartaraf etildi. Javob shakli {success, data} saqlangan.

summary: 3/3 fix qo'llandi. xpController.addVideoWatchXP atomik XP $inc (idempotentlik skipped — sxema noaniq). promptController.likePrompt atomik toggle, getPrompt read-only .lean() (view double-count bartaraf). node --check ikkala faylda ham pass.
